description: Real-world validation hikes demonstrating TrailGenic protocol performance under altitude, endurance, thermal, and climb stress conditions.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic endurance capability under extreme altitude and duration load.
records.notes: Highest peak in contiguous US; extreme altitude and duration; permit required.

records.trail_name: Mount Langley via Cottonwood Lakes Trail and New Army Pass Trail
records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic endurance capability under extreme altitude exposure and prolonged high-elevation duration.
records.notes: Southernmost 14er in US; long approach via Cottonwood Lakes; permit required for overnight.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic consolidation adaptation to high-altitude exposure and sustained mountain climb load.
records.notes: Highest point in Arizona; high altitude above treeline; no permit required.

records.trail_name: Mt Charleston - South Loop Trail (training segments)
records.outcome: Successful high-altitude training ascent demonstrating TrailGenic adaptation to sustained climb load and prolonged altitude exposure.
records.notes: High altitude near metro; rare but accessible.

records.trail_name: San Gorgonio Peak via Vivian Creek
records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic endurance capability under extreme climb load, prolonged duration, and high-altitude exposure.
records.notes: Local extreme endurance anchor; rare but accessible for committed hikers.

records.trail_name: San Gorgonio Peak via South Fork
records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic endurance and consolidation capability across sustained climb load, prolonged duration, and high-altitude exposure.
records.notes: Longer, more gradual approach to SoCal's highest peak; alternate to Vivian Creek; permit required.

records.trail_name: San Jacinto Peak via Marion Mountain
records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic endurance and altitude tolerance across sustained climb load and exposed high-elevation terrain.
records.notes: High altitude monster with repeatable access.

records.trail_name: San Bernardino Peak via Angelus Oaks
records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic consolidation endurance under sustained climb load, altitude exposure, and prolonged mountain duration.
records.notes: SoCal Six Pack peak; long sustained climb; permit required.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic high-intensity climb adaptation under extreme ascent load and exposed alpine terrain.
records.notes: Higher climb severity; advanced protocol days.

records.trail_name: Mt Baldy via Ski Hut Trail (out and back)
records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic endurance and altitude tolerance across sustained high climb load and exposed alpine terrain.
records.notes: Primary extreme altitude anchor; local monster.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic consolidation capability under sustained climb load and high-altitude exposure.
records.notes: Classic SoCal training peak via PCT switchbacks; no permit required.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic consolidation endurance across sustained climb load and high-elevation exposure.
records.notes: High elevation, strong climb; repeatable.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic consolidation capability under sustained climb load, altitude exposure, and technical mountain terrain.
records.notes: Strong training climb; common repeat route.

records.trail_name: Tahquitz Peak via Devils Slide Trail
records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic consolidation capability under altitude exposure and sustained climb load across technical mountain terrain.
records.notes: Repeatable mountain stimulus; easy logistics from Idyllwild.

records.trail_name: Half Dome via John Muir Trail
records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic endurance capability under prolonged duration, sustained climb load, and technical alpine terrain.
records.notes: Iconic Yosemite summit; cable section; permit required; extreme duration and climb.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic consolidation capability under prolonged climb load and sustained high-elevation exposure.
records.notes: High altitude band; durable climb stimulus.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic consolidation adaptation to moderate altitude exposure and sustained climb load.
records.notes: High-country repeatable climb; good altitude band.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic adaptation under sustained climb load and technical mountain terrain.
records.notes: Strong SoCal protocol climb; dependable stimulus.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic endurance consolidation across long-duration mountain terrain with sustained mechanical and climb load.
records.notes: Another strong Wilson analog; repeatable long day.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic endurance consolidation across extended duration, sustained climb load, and complex mountain terrain.
records.notes: Direct anchor analog; long mechanical profile.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic consolidation performance across moderate altitude exposure and sustained climb load over extended distance.
records.notes: Steep, exposed segments; strong stimulus without summit travel.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic adaptation under prolonged climb load and exposed urban-mountain terrain.
records.notes: Exposed climb; great heat/economy training.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic activation through moderate climb load and sustained desert exposure.
records.notes: Highly repeatable; low logistics.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic adaptation to extreme climb load and exposed technical terrain across prolonged ascent.
records.notes: Hardest popular hike in San Diego; relentless ups and downs; great training climb.

records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic activation through moderate climb load and consistent exposure-based conditioning.
records.notes: Repeatable, scenic, low altitude; great adherence trail.

records.trail_name: Potato Chip Rock (Mt Woodson) via Poway
records.outcome: Successful summit demonstrating TrailGenic adaptation to sustained climb load and exposure-based conditioning over mid-distance terrain.
records.notes: Popular but repeatable; consistent climb stimulus.

records.trail_name: Culver City Stairs + Baldwin Hills Scenic Overlook Loop
records.outcome: Successful completion demonstrating foundational TrailGenic training through low climb load repetition and consistent exposure-based conditioning.
records.notes: Micro-dose climb; extremely accessible.
